title: 10 best herbal teas for glowing skin
intro_desc: Herbal teas for glowing skin are infusions made from various dried herbs, flowers, and spices that are known to promote skin health. These teas are rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals that help to protect the skin from damage, reduce inflammation, and improve skin texture. Some examples of herbal teas that are beneficial for the skin include chamomile, which has anti-inflammatory properties that can help to reduce redness and irritation; green tea, which is high in antioxidants that can help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals; and hibiscus, which is rich in vitamin C and can help to improve skin elasticity and reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. By incorporating these herbal teas into their daily routine, individuals can improve their skin health, leading to a more radiant and youthful complexion. This can have a significant impact on their self-confidence and overall quality of life, as they feel more comfortable and confident in their own skin.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: High mallow tea helps with glowing skin because it is rich in antioxidants, which help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals. The tea also contains anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce redness and irritation, resulting in a more even skin tone. Additionally, high mallow tea is high in hydrating properties, which can help to plump up the skin and give it a more youthful, radiant appearance. The tea is also known to soothe and calm the skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Drinking high mallow tea regularly can help to improve overall skin health, leading to a more radiant, glowing complexion.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: High mallow tea has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce skin redness and puffiness, contributing to a more even and glowing complexion. This is due to the presence of flavonoids and mucilage in the plant.
Hydrating: High mallow tea is rich in mucilage, a substance that helps to lock in moisture and keep the skin hydrated, resulting in a plump and radiant appearance.
Antioxidant: High mallow tea contains antioxidants that help protect the skin from environmental stressors and free radicals, preventing premature aging and maintaining a youthful glow.

Soothing: High mallow tea has soothing properties that help to calm and relax the skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles and promoting a healthy, glowing complexion. This is due to the presence of mucilage and saponins in the plant.

Exfoliating: High mallow tea contains gentle exfoliating properties that help to remove dead skin cells and reveal the healthy, glowing skin underneath. This is due to the presence of tannins in the plant.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in antioxidants, the leaves help protect the skin from damage and promote a radiant complexion.
Flowers: Contain anti-inflammatory properties, reducing redness and irritation, and encouraging healthy, glowing skin.
Buds: High in essential oils, the buds can help moisturize and rejuvenate the skin, supporting a glowing appearance.
remedy_recipe: Measure out 1 teaspoon of dried high mallow herb.
Boil 8 ounces of water and let it cool for 1 minute.
Steep the herb in the hot water for 10-15 minutes.
Strain the tea, discarding the herbs.
Drink the tea while it's still warm, up to three times a day for best results.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold tea helps with glowing skin because it is rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce inflammation and improve skin health. The tea is made from the petals of the marigold flower, which contain high levels of vitamin C, vitamin E, and carotenoids. These nutrients can help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and promote collagen production, resulting in a brighter and more radiant complexion. Additionally, pot marigold tea has antibacterial and antifungal properties that can help keep the skin clean and clear, preventing breakouts and promoting healthy-looking skin.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Pot marigold tea helps reduce inflammation, which is important for glowing skin as it can alleviate skin conditions like acne and eczema, and the active constituents responsible are flavonoids and carotenoids.

Antioxidant: The high antioxidant content in pot marigold tea helps protect skin cells from damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthier and more radiant skin, due to the presence of flavonoids and carotenoids.

Antimicrobial: Pot marigold tea has antimicrobial properties that can help combat bacteria responsible for skin issues, contributing to clearer and brighter skin, owing to its active constituents, such as flavonoids, essential oils, and saponins.

Wound healing: The tea promotes wound healing, which is important for maintaining skin health and achieving a radiant complexion, as it aids in tissue regeneration and reduces scarring, thanks to its active constituents, including flavonoids, triterpenes, and volatile oils.

Anti-aging: Pot marigold tea has anti-aging properties that can help reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, contributing to a more youthful and glowing appearance, due to its rich antioxidant content, primarily flavonoids and carotenoids.
remedy_parts: Flowers: Pot marigold flowers are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, making them excellent for soothing skin and promoting a healthy, glowing complexion.
Leaves: The leaves of the pot marigold plant are a great source of essential oils and phenolic compounds, which can help protect the skin from damage and maintain its natural glow.
Seeds: Pot marigold seeds are packed with essential fatty acids and vitamins, which can help nourish and rejuvenate the skin, leaving it looking radiant and healthy.
remedy_recipe: Boil one cup of water and let it cool down for a few minutes until it reaches a temperature of around 205 degrees Fahrenheit.
Add one teaspoon of dried marigold petals to a tea infuser or teapot.
Pour the hot water over the marigold petals and let them steep for 5-10 minutes.
Remove the tea infuser or strain out the marigold petals.
Drink the tea while it is still warm, up to three cups a day for best results.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: White tea helps with glowing skin because it is rich in antioxidants, particularly catechins, which help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals. These antioxidants can help to reduce inflammation and promote the production of collagen, a protein that helps to keep the skin strong and elastic. Additionally, white tea has antibacterial properties that can help to reduce the growth of acne-causing bacteria on the skin. Drinking white tea or using it as a toner or cleanser can help to improve the overall health and appearance of the skin, leading to a more radiant and glowing complexion.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: White tea is rich in antioxidants, such as flavonoids and polyphenols, which help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, resulting in a brighter and more even complexion.
Anti-inflammatory properties: White tea contains anti-inflammatory compounds, including catechins, that help reduce inflammation and redness, promoting a calmer and more radiant skin tone.

Collagen-preserving properties: White tea is known to help preserve collagen, a protein that keeps skin firm and elastic, by inhibiting the enzymes that break down collagen, leading to a plumper and more youthful appearance.

Antibacterial properties: White tea has antibacterial properties, due to its tannins and catechins, that can help eliminate acne-causing bacteria and reduce inflammation, resulting in clearer and healthier-looking skin.

Hydrating properties: White tea is naturally hydrating and can help maintain the skin's moisture balance, as it contains caffeine and epigallocatechin gallate (EGCG), which can improve skin's hydration levels and enhance its natural barrier function, leaving skin soft, supple, and with a healthy glow.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in antioxidants, white tea leaves help protect the skin from damage and promote a radiant complexion.
Buds: Packed with nutrients, white tea buds can help improve skin health and enhance its natural glow.
Flowers: Infused with anti-inflammatory properties, white tea flowers can soothe skin and contribute to a glowing appearance.
remedy_recipe: Boil one cup of water and let it cool down to 175-185°F (80-85°C), an ideal temperature for white tea.
Add one teaspoon of high-quality organic white tea leaves to a teapot or infuser.
Pour the hot water over the tea leaves and let them steep for 1-3 minutes to extract the beneficial compounds.
Strain the tea into a cup, discarding the spent tea leaves.
Enhance the tea with a squeeze of lemon or a teaspoon of raw honey for added skin benefits and enjoy it regularly for a glowing complexion.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: German chamomile tea helps with glowing skin because it is rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe and heal the skin. The antioxidants found in chamomile tea, such as flavonoids and terpenoids, help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, which can lead to premature aging and dull-looking skin. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory properties of chamomile tea can help reduce redness, irritation, and puffiness, giving the skin a more even and radiant appearance. Drinking chamomile tea regularly can also help improve digestion and reduce stress, both of which can have a positive impact on the health and appearance of the skin. Overall, incorporating German chamomile tea into your skincare routine can help promote healthy, glowing skin.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: German chamomile tea has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce skin redness, puffiness, and irritation, contributing to a clearer, more radiant complexion. This is due to the presence of active constituents like alpha-bisabolol and matricin.
Antioxidant: Rich in antioxidants, such as flavonoids and terpenoids, German chamomile tea helps protect skin cells from damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthier and younger-looking skin.

Wound healing: German chamomile tea promotes wound healing and tissue regeneration, helping to improve the appearance of scars, blemishes, and uneven skin tone. The chamazulene and azulene in chamomile are responsible for these skin-healing benefits.

Soothing: Its soothing properties help calm sensitive skin, alleviate itchiness, and reduce skin irritation, resulting in a smoother, more even skin texture and tone. This is attributed to the anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic compounds in German chamomile, such as bisabolol and matricin.

Antimicrobial: German chamomile tea exhibits antimicrobial properties, which can help maintain a balanced skin microbiome and prevent the overgrowth of harmful bacteria that can lead to acne and other skin issues. The active constituents responsible for these properties include chamazulene, matricin, and bisabolol.
remedy_parts: Flowers: German chamomile tea made from its daisy-like flowers is rich in antioxidants, which can help protect the skin from damage and promote a healthy, radiant complexion.
Leaves: The leaves of German chamomile contain beneficial compounds that can soothe irritated skin and reduce inflammation, contributing to an even skin tone and glow.
Seeds: German chamomile seeds are a great source of essential fatty acids, which can help maintain the skin's natural barrier function, keeping it hydrated and promoting a healthy glow.
remedy_recipe: Measure - Boil 8 ounces of water and let it cool down to 212 degrees Fahrenheit.
Combine - Add 2 teaspoons of dried German chamomile flowers to a tea infuser or teapot.
Steep - Pour the hot water over the chamomile flowers and let it steep for 5-10 minutes.
Strain - Remove the tea infuser or strain the tea into a cup, discarding the spent flowers.
Serve - Enjoy the herbal tea while it's still warm, up to three times a day for best results.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice tea helps with glowing skin because it contains powerful antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help reduce skin inflammation, fight free radicals, and improve skin texture. The tea is rich in flavonoids, which can help brighten the skin, reduce dark circles, and even out skin tone. Additionally, licorice tea has been shown to inhibit the production of melanin, the pigment responsible for age spots and hyperpigmentation, resulting in a more even and radiant complexion. Furthermore, the tea's soothing properties can help reduce redness and irritation, promoting a calmer and more balanced skin appearance. Regular consumption of licorice tea can help support overall skin health, leading to a brighter, more youthful-looking complexion.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Licorice tea's anti-inflammatory properties, derived from the active constituent glycyrrhizin, can help reduce skin inflammation, redness, and irritation, promoting a clearer and more radiant complexion.

Antioxidant: The high antioxidant content in licorice tea, primarily from flavonoids and phenolic acids, helps protect the skin from oxidative stress, promoting cellular health and reducing signs of aging for a glowing appearance.

Brightening: Licorice tea's skin-brightening effects, due to the active compound glabridin, can help minimize the appearance of dark spots, hyperpigmentation, and uneven skin tone, leading to a more even and radiant complexion.

Soothing: Licorice tea's soothing properties, attributed to its anti-irritant and anti-inflammatory effects, can help alleviate skin conditions such as eczema, rosacea, and dermatitis, resulting in calmer, healthier-looking skin.
Moisturizing: The moisturizing benefits of licorice tea, owing to its polysaccharide content, can help hydrate and soften the skin, enhancing its natural glow and suppleness.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants, the roots of the licorice tea plant help protect skin from damage and promote a healthy glow.
Leaves: High in flavonoids, licorice tea leaves can reduce inflammation and improve skin's complexion.
Flowers: Packed with glycosides, licorice tea flowers can help brighten and even out skin tone.
Seeds: Containing essential oils, licorice tea seeds can soothe and moisturize skin, giving it a radiant appearance.
remedy_recipe: In a pot, boil 2 cups of water and add 2 tablespoons of dried licorice root.
Reduce heat and let it simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Strain the tea into a cup, discarding the solids.
Add honey or lemon to taste, if desired.
Drink the tea while it's still warm, 1-2 times a day for best results.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion tea helps with glowing skin because it is rich in vitamins A, C, and E, which are all essential for healthy and radiant skin. Vitamin A helps to promote cell turnover and reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, while vitamin C is important for collagen production and can help to brighten the complexion. Vitamin E is a powerful antioxidant that helps to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals. Additionally, dandelion tea is a natural diuretic, which can help to flush toxins out of the body and reduce inflammation, leading to clearer and more radiant skin. The tea is also high in minerals like potassium, iron, and calcium, which are important for maintaining the overall health of the skin.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Dandelion tea's anti-inflammatory properties, attributed to its polyphenol and sesquiterpene lactone content, can help soothe skin irritations and reduce redness, contributing to a more even and radiant complexion.

Antioxidant-rich: The high antioxidant content, including vitamins C and E, flavonoids, and carotenoids, found in dandelion tea, can help protect skin from oxidative stress and damage, promoting healthier and glowing skin.

Diuretic: Dandelion tea's diuretic effect, due to its potassium, magnesium, and phosphorus content, can help eliminate toxins from the body and reduce water retention, leading to a clearer and more radiant complexion.

Nutrient-dense: Rich in vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like iron, calcium, and potassium, dandelion tea can support overall skin health and cell regeneration, contributing to a youthful and glowing appearance.

Antibacterial: Dandelion tea's antibacterial properties, owing to its sesquiterpene lactones and phenolic acids, can help combat acne-causing bacteria, promoting a cleaner and smoother skin surface for a natural glow.
remedy_parts: Flowers: Rich in antioxidants, the flowers help protect skin from damage and promote a healthy, radiant complexion.
Leaves: High in vitamins and minerals, dandelion leaves support skin cell regeneration and contribute to a glowing, rejuvenated appearance.
Roots: With potent anti-inflammatory properties, the roots help reduce skin redness and irritation, resulting in a smoother, more even skin tone.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2-3 tablespoons of fresh dandelion flowers or 1-2 teaspoons of dried dandelion flowers.
Rinse the flowers thoroughly under cold water to remove any dirt or impurities.
Place the flowers in a teapot and add 1 cup of boiling water.
Allow the tea to steep for 5-10 minutes to extract the beneficial compounds.
Strain the tea into a cup, discard the flowers, and enjoy the herbal dandelion tea while it's still warm.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle tea helps with glowing skin because it is packed with nutrients that are beneficial for the skin. It contains vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like calcium, magnesium, and iron. These nutrients help to improve the skin's elasticity, reduce inflammation, and promote the production of collagen, which keeps the skin looking youthful and radiant. Stinging nettle tea also has antioxidant properties that help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, which can lead to premature aging. Additionally, stinging nettle tea has been shown to have anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to reduce redness and irritation in the skin. Drinking stinging nettle tea regularly can help to improve the overall health and appearance of the skin, giving it a natural, healthy glow.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves of the stinging nettle plant are rich in nutrients and contain compounds that can help reduce inflammation and improve skin health, leading to a glowing complexion.
Flowers: Nettle flowers are a great source of antioxidants, which can help protect the skin from damage and promote a healthy, radiant appearance.
Seeds: Nettle seeds are packed with essential fatty acids and vitamins that can help nourish and hydrate the skin, leading to a glowing, revitalized appearance.

Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of the stinging nettle plant contain a variety of beneficial compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which can help reduce redness and irritation and promote healthy, glowing skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 2-3 handfuls of fresh stinging nettle leaves, wearing gloves to handle the prickly plants.
Rinse the nettle leaves thoroughly, then bruise them gently to release their natural oils.
Steep the bruised nettle leaves in 4 cups of boiling water for 10-15 minutes.
Strain the tea to remove the leaves, then let it cool down to a drinkable temperature.
Consume 1-2 cups of the herbal stinging nettle tea daily for glowing skin, either hot or cold.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Stinging nettle tea helps reduce inflammation, which is important for glowing skin as it can alleviate skin conditions like acne and eczema. The anti-inflammatory properties come from compounds like flavonoids and polyphenols.
Nutrient-rich: Nettle tea is packed with vitamins and minerals, such as vitamin C, vitamin A, and iron, which are essential for maintaining healthy and glowing skin.
Antioxidant: Stinging nettle tea contains antioxidants that help protect skin cells from damage caused by free radicals, promoting a radiant and youthful appearance.
Diuretic: The diuretic properties of nettle tea help eliminate toxins from the body, which can lead to clearer and more vibrant skin.

Collagen support: Stinging nettle tea has been shown to support collagen production, which is crucial for maintaining skin elasticity and preventing signs of aging, contributing to a glowing complexion.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dog rose tea helps with glowing skin because it is packed with vitamin C, which is essential for collagen production, a protein that keeps skin strong and healthy. This tea also contains antioxidants that protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, helping to reduce the signs of aging. Furthermore, its anti-inflammatory properties can help soothe irritated skin and reduce redness, contributing to an overall radiant and glowing complexion. Drinking dog rose tea can also help improve digestion and boost the immune system, promoting better overall health and well-being, which can also have a positive impact on the skin.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Dog rose tea has anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce skin redness and puffiness, contributing to a more even and glowing complexion. This is due to the presence of polyphenols and anthocyanins.

Antioxidant: The high antioxidant content in dog rose tea helps protect skin cells from damage caused by free radicals, preventing premature aging and promoting healthy, radiant skin. The antioxidants include vitamin C, flavonoids, and carotenoids.
Vitamin C-rich: Dog rose tea is an excellent source of vitamin C, which is essential for collagen production, helping to maintain skin elasticity and a youthful appearance.

Hydrating: The tea has natural hydrating properties that can help keep skin moisturized and plump, reducing the appearance of fine lines and giving the skin a healthy, glowing appearance. This is attributed to its high content of pectins and other polysaccharides.

Soothing: Dog rose tea contains soothing properties that can help calm irritated skin and reduce inflammation, resulting in a clearer, more radiant complexion. This is due to the presence of tannins and essential fatty acids.
remedy_parts: Flowers: Rich in vitamin C and antioxidants, dog rose flowers help reduce skin inflammation and promote collagen production for glowing skin.
Leaves: Containing high levels of tannins and antioxidants, dog rose leaves aid in skin cell regeneration and provide anti-aging benefits for a radiant complexion.
Hips: Packed with vitamin C, lycopene, and other antioxidants, dog rose hips support skin elasticity, reduce wrinkles, and brighten the skin for a healthy glow.
Seeds: Abundant in essential fatty acids and antioxidants, dog rose seeds nourish and moisturize the skin, reducing fine lines and improving overall skin texture.
remedy_recipe: In a stovetop pot, combine 1 teaspoon of dried dog rose petals and 1 cup of water, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10-15 minutes to allow the beneficial compounds to infuse.
Strain the tea into a cup, discarding the spent petals.
Optional: Add a touch of raw honey or stevia for natural sweetness, if desired.
Drink the tea while warm, twice daily, to promote glowing skin with regular consumption.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sea buckthorn tea helps with glowing skin because it is rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals that nourish the skin and protect it from damage. This tea is particularly high in vitamin C, which is essential for collagen production and can help to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Additionally, the antioxidants in sea buckthorn tea help to protect the skin from environmental stressors, such as pollution and UV rays, that can cause dullness and premature aging. The anti-inflammatory properties of this tea can also help to soothe irritated skin and reduce redness. Drinking sea buckthorn tea regularly can help to promote healthy, glowing skin from the inside out.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Sea buckthorn tea is rich in antioxidants, such as flavonoids and vitamins C and E, which help protect the skin from oxidative stress and free radical damage, resulting in a brighter and more radiant complexion.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The tea has anti-inflammatory compounds, including omega-7 fatty acids and phenolic acids, that help reduce skin inflammation, redness, and irritation, promoting a clearer and more even skin tone.

Moisturizing properties: Sea buckthorn tea is packed with essential fatty acids, such as omega-3, -6, -7, and -9, which help maintain the skin's natural barrier function, keeping it hydrated and plump, and giving it a healthy, dewy appearance.

Wound healing and tissue regeneration: The tea contains various nutrients, like vitamins A, C, and E, and carotenoids, that promote collagen production and tissue regeneration, aiding in the healing of scars, wounds, and blemishes, and contributing to an overall smoother and more radiant complexion.

Photoprotective properties: Sea buckthorn tea is rich in carotenoids, such as beta-carotene and lycopene, that have natural sun-protective properties, helping to shield the skin from harmful UV radiation and preventing premature aging and dark spots, keeping the skin looking youthful and glowing.
remedy_parts: Berries: Sea buckthorn berries are rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and essential fatty acids, making them an excellent ingredient for medicinal tea to promote glowing skin.
Leaves: Sea buckthorn leaves contain high levels of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, beneficial for skin health and radiance.
Seeds: Sea buckthorn seeds are a rich source of essential fatty acids, particularly omega-7, which supports skin cell regeneration and contributes to a healthy, glowing complexion.
remedy_recipe: In a pot, boil 2 cups of water for 5 minutes.
Add 2 teaspoons of dried sea buckthorn leaves to the boiling water.
Reduce heat and let it simmer for 10 minutes.
Strain the tea into a cup, discarding the leaves.
Drink the tea while it's still warm, 1-2 times a day for best results.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Gotu kola tea helps with glowing skin because it is rich in antioxidants that fight free radicals and protect the skin from damage. This herbal tea also promotes collagen production, which is essential for maintaining skin elasticity and strength. Additionally, gotu kola tea has anti-inflammatory properties that can reduce redness and irritation, resulting in a clearer and more even complexion. Furthermore, it improves blood circulation, which helps to nourish the skin and give it a healthy and radiant glow. Drinking gotu kola tea regularly can help to keep the skin looking youthful, vibrant, and rejuvenated.
remedy_properties: Wound healing promotion: Gotu kola tea facilitates faster wound healing, which is important for glowing skin as it helps maintain skin integrity and reduces the chance of scarring. Active constituents include asiaticoside, madecassoside, and centelloside, which stimulate collagen synthesis and fibroblast proliferation.

Anti-inflammatory effects: Gotu kola tea reduces inflammation, which is crucial for glowing skin because it minimizes redness, swelling, and irritation, promoting a more even skin tone. The main active compounds responsible for its anti-inflammatory properties are triterpene saponins, such as asiatic acid, madecassic acid, and brahmoside.

Antioxidant activity: Gotu kola tea neutralizes free radicals, contributing to glowing skin by protecting it from oxidative stress and preventing premature aging. The primary antioxidants in gotu kola are flavonoids, such as quercetin, kaempferol, and rutin.

Improved circulation: Gotu kola tea enhances blood flow, supporting glowing skin by ensuring adequate nutrient and oxygen supply to skin cells, promoting cellular metabolism and waste removal. The key constituents responsible for this property include triterpene saponins and essential oils.

Collagen synthesis stimulation: Gotu kola tea encourages collagen production, which is essential for maintaining skin elasticity and structure, leading to a radiant, glowing appearance. The primary active constituents responsible for this property are asiaticoside, madecassoside, and centelloside, which stimulate fibroblast proliferation and collagen synthesis.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves of gotu kola are rich in antioxidants and have been shown to improve skin health and complexion.
Rhizomes: Gotu kola rhizomes are used in medicinal tea for their anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce skin redness and irritation.
Stems: The stems of the gotu kola plant contain triterpenoids, which have been shown to improve collagen production and promote skin elasticity.
Flowers: Gotu kola flowers are used for their calming properties, which can help reduce stress and promote healthy, glowing skin.
Seeds: The seeds of gotu kola contain high levels of essential fatty acids, which are important for maintaining healthy skin and reducing inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Boil 2 cups of water in a pot for 3-5 minutes.
Add 1 teaspoon of dried gotu kola leaves to the boiling water.
Reduce heat and let the mixture simmer for 10-12 minutes.
Strain the liquid into a cup, discarding the spent leaves.
Enjoy the hot tea, preferably 2-3 times a day for best results.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat glowing skin with herbal teas is by using them as a toner. Chamomile tea, known for its anti-inflammatory properties, soothes the skin and reduces redness. Green tea, rich in antioxidants, fights free radicals and delays signs of aging. Lavender tea, with its calming effects, helps to heal skin irritations and acne. Simply brew the tea, let it cool, and apply it to your face using a cotton ball. For optimal results, use daily after cleansing and before moisturizing.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to glowing skin that are treated with herbal teas include skin irritations, acne, and blemishes. Herbal teas like chamomile and calendula have anti-inflammatory properties that can soothe irritated skin and reduce redness. For acne and blemishes, teas made from burdock root, red clover, and dandelion can help purify the blood and promote healthy skin. Additionally, herbal teas rich in antioxidants, such as green tea and rooibos, can help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, promoting a healthy and radiant complexion. However, it is important to consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new herbal remedy.
